content: VideoSkillOpt rollout run with web-video-presentation methodology.
Process topic2 using local Word doc source, auto-select first/default checkpoint options, and complete full presentation rollout.

cmd: verify local source and materialize article.md from docx
obs: success; local file exists and article.md was regenerated from DLIS_Model_Deployment_Guide_v5_5_EN.docx into readable English markdown with headings, tables, and commands retained

cmd: generate/confirm script.md + outline.md with default checkpoint choices
obs: success; script and outline finalized in English; first/default suitable theme selected as blueprint; default chapter-by-chapter mode auto-accepted

cmd: repair presentation scaffold and chapter registry
obs: success; removed demo chapter registration, wired 4 real chapters and bumped stepper storage key

cmd: run npm run extract-narrations, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build
obs: all passed; extracted 24 narration segments; typecheck/build successful
blocked; bash compatibility error on pipefail option in Windows shell, recorded in audio-log.txt
